title: Teja2 Real Estate | Contact
description: Contact Teja2 for buying or selling property in Aljarafe and Seville.
hero: We work with a flexible model without a public office. Meetings are held at the property, in Seville/Aljarafe or by video call.

sections.heading: How we work
items: We prioritize personalized advice, market analysis and direct transaction management.
We also provide technical validation services for selected real estate assets.
